text:
dataset includes HRS survey information linked to CMS claims and assessment data for the HRS study population. The HRS has been fielded since 1992 and surveys more than 30,000 people age 50 and older.

The Health and Retirement Study (HRS) is designed to:

facilitate understanding of the relationship between medical history and financial status

examine how use of health care may change as people age.

The longitudinal survey data is linked to CMS data to provide information on health care
